# OpenAI Status Page
Last Updated: Sunday, March 22, 2026, 10:12:28 GMT

## Recent Incidents (All Resolved)

1. **Pinned chats loading failure** (March 21, 2026)
   - Affected: Conversations component
   - Status: "All impacted services have now fully recovered"

2. **Sora video generation errors** (March 18, 2026)
   - Affected: Video generation component
   - Status: "Video generation error rates have returned to normal levels"

3. **Excel Plugin accessibility** (March 17, 2026)
   - Affected: Connectors/Apps component

## Service Components Mentioned

- Conversations
- Login/Authentication
- File uploads/downloads
- Image Generation (DALL-E, Images)
- Video generation (Sora)
- Codex
- Chat Completions
- Embeddings
- Fine-tuning
- Moderations
- Batch processing
- Audio
- Realtime API
- GPTs
- Connectors/Apps
- Deep Research

- Voice mode
